title: Verify local insight privacy boundaries
preconditions: Seeded canaries exist in every sensitive request, report, private manifest, merchant description, path, backup, and error condition.
steps: Run all success, failure, crash, retry, delete, validation, backup, verify, restore, and migration flows; inspect modes, ownership, process table, outputs, diagnostics, logs, crash and temp artifacts, and Git state.
expected: Every artifact is owner-only and zero seeded canaries appear outside explicitly requested business results or the approved ignored private evidence.
